description_long: This is a straight wooden ladder with two vertical side rails and six evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The wood has a medium brown finish, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The rungs are rectangular and flush with the rails, providing stable footing for climbing. The side rails are also rectangular in profile, appearing sturdy and robust, likely made from solid wood. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails, indicating a basic, traditional design. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight enough to be portable but strong enough to support an adult's weight.
description: A classic straight wooden ladder with six evenly spaced rectangular rungs and a medium brown finish. The design is simple and functional, with sturdy rectangular side rails.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six horizontal rungs and both vertical side rails clearly.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the thin, rectangular cross-section of the ladder and the depth of the rails.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the rungs and rails from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile and depth of the ladder.
